commit_message: test(android): stabilize repo split inspector assertions
pr_title: feat(android): use repo tree as responsive split inspector
pr_body: Fixes the repo split inspector regression tests: split navigation is CSS-hidden in portrait test runtime, and file clicks must be scoped to the dialog when split and dialog are both mounted.

blocks.search: import { fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor } from "@testing-library/react";
blocks.replace: import { fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor, within } from "@testing-library/react";
expect(screen.getByRole("navigation", { name: "Repo Baum Split Inspector", hidden: true })).toBeDefined();
